items.title_en: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton to step down, leave company in August
items.title_zh: 辉瑞首席财务官戴夫·丹顿 (Dave Denton) 将于 8 月辞职
items.desc_en: Pfizer said on Thursday that finance ⁠chief Dave Denton will step down ​and leave ​the U.S. drugmaker ​on August 15.
items.desc_zh: 辉瑞公司周四表示，财务总监戴夫·丹顿 (Dave Denton) 将于 8 月 15 日辞职并离开这家美国制药商。

items.title_en: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
items.title_zh: 人工智能教父抨击马斯克的 xAI 是“失败”，称实验室正面临“大泡沫爆炸”的风险
items.desc_en: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.
items.desc_zh: Yann LeCun 的言论再次引发了与马斯克之间的长期争执，并对一些全球最大的人工智能公司的估值产生了质疑。

items.title_en: Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% amid Iran war peace prospects
items.title_zh: 英国央行在伊朗战争和平前景中维持利率在3.75%

items.title_en: Hollister partners with Target to tap into $89 billion back-to-college shopping market
items.title_zh: Hollister 与 Target 合作进军价值 890 亿美元的返校购物市场
items.desc_en: Hollister's partnership with Target comes as both companies look to capitalize on the lucrative back-to-college shopping market.
items.desc_zh: Hollister 与塔吉特 (Target) 合作之际，两家公司都希望利用利润丰厚的返校购物市场。

items.title_en: This AI infrastructure stock up more than 200% this year has more room to run, KeyBanc says
items.title_zh: KeyBanc 表示，今年人工智能基础设施库存增长超过 200%，还有更大的运行空间
items.desc_en: The bank has an overweight rating on the AI infrastructure name.
items.desc_zh: 该银行对人工智能基础设施名称给予增持评级。

items.title_en: Trump hits back at critics as Iran peace deal fuels debate over U.S. concessions
items.title_zh: 伊朗和平协议引发有关美国让步的争论，特朗普回击批评者
items.desc_en: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.
items.desc_zh: 根据协议，双方承诺在未来 60 天内进行进一步谈判以达成最终协议，其中包括一项价值 3000 亿美元的伊朗重建计划。

items.title_en: Roy Cooper's North Carolina Senate race could help decide control of the next Congress
items.title_zh: 罗伊·库珀的北卡罗来纳州参议员竞选可能有助于决定下一届国会的控制权
items.desc_en: North Carolina’s 2026 Senate race pits Democrat Roy Cooper against Republican Michael Whatley in a swing state Democrats haven't won since with Obama in 2008.
items.desc_zh: 北卡罗来纳州 2026 年参议员竞选将由民主党人罗伊·库珀 (Roy Cooper) 与共和党人迈克尔·沃特利 (Michael Whatley) 对阵，这是一个摇摆州，自 2008 年奥巴马当选以来，民主党从未赢得过胜利。

items.title_en: Nearly 80% of data center capacity is at elevated risk to climate hazards like flooding and fire, study says
items.title_zh: 研究称，近 80% 的数据中心容量面临洪水和火灾等气候灾害的较高风险
items.desc_en: The vast majority of data centers globally face either acute risk from climate change events or chronic risk from ongoing climate issues like extreme heat.
items.desc_zh: 全球绝大多数数据中心要么面临气候变化事件带来的严重风险，要么面临极端高温等持续气候问题的长期风险。

items.title_en: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
items.title_zh: 莫斯科遭遇俄罗斯全面战争爆发以来最大规模的乌克兰袭击
items.desc_en: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.desc_zh: 近 200 架乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯首都东南部的一个地区，一座炼油厂和一座购物中心被烧毁。

items.title_en: Obama Center launch brings Democratic political glitterati to Chicago ahead of crucial elections
items.title_zh: 奥巴马中心的启动将民主党政治精英在关键选举前聚集到芝加哥
items.desc_en: Political elites, White House alums, donors and business leaders will converge on Chicago on Thursday to commemorate the launch of the Obama Presidential Center.
items.desc_zh: 政治精英、白宫校友、捐助者和商界领袖将于周四齐聚芝加哥，纪念奥巴马总统中心的落成。

items.title_en: Lawyer in high-profile Ugandan treason case charged with related offence
items.title_zh: 备受瞩目的乌干达叛国案律师被控相关罪行
items.desc_en: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.
items.desc_zh: 乌干达军事首领吹嘘他会给本周早些时候被捕的埃里亚斯·卢瓦戈造成“伤害和痛苦”。

items.title_en: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
items.title_zh: 涉嫌团伙头目在机场鲜花花束伏击中被枪杀
items.desc_en: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.
items.desc_zh: 枪手在瓜亚基尔机场外等待受害者时，将武器藏在鲜花和毛绒玩具后面。

items.title_en: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声和爆炸声
items.desc_en: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.desc_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.title_en: Hegseth warns NATO allies that some nations will 'fail' U.S. defense review
items.title_zh: 赫格斯警告北约盟国，一些国家将“无法通过”美国国防审查
items.desc_en: The U.S. defense secretary also said it was "shameful" that European allies refused to give U.S. forces access to bases to strike Iran.
items.desc_zh: 美国国防部长还表示，欧洲盟国拒绝让美军进入基地打击伊朗，这是“可耻的”。

items.title_en: Intel surges 9% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示公司将与苹果在美国芯片设计领域合作，英特尔股价飙升 9%
items.desc_en: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.
items.desc_zh: 随着芯片制造商从多年的逆风中恢复过来，这一提振延续了近期的涨势。

items.title_en: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
items.title_zh: 美伊协议有哪些内容？
items.desc_en: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.
items.desc_zh: 这份共 14 段的备忘录包括结束战斗、达成伊朗永远不会拥有核武器的协议，以及为伊朗提供 3000 亿美元的重建计划。

items.title_en: The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actress Daveigh Chase dies aged 35
items.title_zh: 《指环王》和《星际宝贝》女演员戴维·蔡斯去世，享年 35 岁
items.desc_en: Chase died from sepsis following a bout with meningitis in a Los Angeles hospital, her longtime manager told the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 蔡斯的长期经理告诉英国广播公司，蔡斯在洛杉矶一家医院因脑膜炎而死于败血症。

items.title_en: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣小泉纯一郎告诉 BBC，日本加强防卫对于防止战争“至关重要”
items.desc_en: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
items.desc_zh: 小泉进二郎表示，日本需要重新审视自第二次世界大战以来定义的和平主义姿态。

items.title_en: SpaceX adds longtime Elon Musk ally Roelof Botha to board
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的长期盟友 Roelof Botha 加入 SpaceX 董事会
items.desc_en: Roelof Botha, who worked with Elon Musk at PayPal in the dot-com era before becoming a prominent venture capitalist, is joining the SpaceX board.
items.desc_zh: 罗洛夫·博塔 (Roelof Botha) 即将加入 SpaceX 董事会，他曾在互联网时代与埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在 PayPal 共事，后来成为著名的风险投资家。

items.title_en: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
items.title_zh: 以下是凯文·沃什作为美联储主席首次会议的五个要点
items.desc_en: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.
items.desc_zh: 周三，美联储和主席凯文·沃什在利率问题上密切关注。

items.title_en: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.desc_en: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.desc_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.desc_zh: 他们表示，针对林赛和克雷格·福尔曼的诉讼程序存在严重违规行为。

items.title_en: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
items.title_zh: 在长岛镇谋杀八名妇女的连环杀手被终身监禁
items.desc_en: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.desc_zh: 在激烈的交锋中，法官判处他三项无期徒刑，外加其他四项罪名，判处 25 年无期徒刑，所有罪名都是连续执行的。

items.title_en: Trump says he will visit India as frosty relationship with Modi thaws
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，随着与莫迪的冰冷关系解冻，他将访问印度
items.desc_en: Trump made the announcement during chat where he also vowed to protect India.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普在聊天中宣布了这一消息，他还誓言要保护印度。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.title_en: Google, Nvidia and Anthropic bosses' AI tips for students
items.title_zh: 谷歌、英伟达和 Anthropic 老板给学生的人工智能建议
items.desc_en: Sundar Pichai, Jensen Huang and Jack Clark share their advice with the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai)、黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 和杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 与 BBC 分享了他们的建议。

items.title_en: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade

items.desc_en: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.
items.desc_zh: 船舶跟踪数据显示，三艘满载原油的伊朗油轮已通过美国在阿曼湾的封锁线。

items.title_zh: 武装人员冲进刚果民主共和国医院后寻找六岁埃博拉患者
items.desc_en: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.
items.desc_zh: 在当前的疫情爆发期间，由于错误信息和恐惧，卫生设施受到攻击。

items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.desc_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.desc_zh: 特朗普周二表示，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡需要“对黎巴嫩更加负责”。
